memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_Init

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the revision number of the ONSEMI device.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M Device Revision Number.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_LineRateReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function reconfigures the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M cable redriver.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the revision number of the ONSEMI device.
specifies if the mode is FRL or TMDS.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function prints out all the contents from OnsemiRegisterFields array.
